title: The Executioner
overview: Mitsuki’s dreams come true when he is isekai’d to another, magical world! Once he meets the kindly priestess Menou, his grand adventure is sure to begin… right?

title: The Lost One
overview: When Akari unveils a terrifying ability, Menou grants her a stay of execution... temporarily, at least. A foolproof method of delivering death is just a train ride away.

title: Taboo in [Red]
overview: An ordinary trip by train goes off the rails when Menou and Akari are caught in the crossfire of a terrorist attack on Princess Ashuna.

title: The Ancient Capital Garm
overview: A priestess pure, just and strong—or a villain reviled by all? Menou knows precisely which one she wants to be, and she has one person to thank for her singularity of purpose.

title: Goodbye
overview: As Momo investigates a rash of disappearances, Menou and Akari spend a final day together. But sinister forces move in the shadows, and the upcoming ritual isn’t as it seems…

title: [Regression: Memories, Soul, Spirit]
overview: A ominous plot unfolds, trapping Akari and Menou in its center. But help is coming from the outside — and from within, too, if Menou can play her cards just right.

title: Port City of Libelle
overview: The dreaded Pandemonium provides the people of Libelle a stark reminder of the power of Pure Concept — and it reminds Menou of what’s at stake in her quest to kill Akari.

title: Monstrine
overview: A dangerous drug has flooded the streets of Libelle, but Menou isn’t the only one on the case. Who will uncover the truth first, and what is Manon Libelle planning?

title: At the Evening Ball
overview: As Momo and Menou unearth the source of monstrine, Akari takes matters into her own hands. But there is more to the mysterious Manon Libelle than she bargained for...

title: The Daughter of a Lost One
overview: Manon reveals a startling connection to Menou’s mentor and an even more startling power, but she's far from the greatest danger lurking inside Libelle… or even inside herself.

title: Pandæmonium
overview: What are the consequences of an Executioner failing to eliminate her target? For Menou and Akari, the answer is more terrible than anything they could have imagined.

title: The Duo’s Journey
overview: Chaos reigns in the fight against Pandemonium, and with ether in short supply, Menou is running out of options to defeat the looming evil. But through Akari, there is a way…
